properties.name: richtext_label_5
properties.text: NOTE: Hi-Vis to be worn at all times. Reflective Tape in dim /dark conditions.
properties.textTranslation: NOTE: Hi-Vis to be worn at all times. Reflective Tape in dim /dark conditions.

properties.name: Label 2
properties.text: I have notified site contact of my presence and I have signed in (where required) *
properties.textTranslation: I have notified site contact of my presence and I have signed in (where required) *

properties.name: Label 3
properties.text: I have been inducted as required by the site *
properties.textTranslation: I have been inducted as required by the site *

properties.name: Label 4
properties.text: The weather and lighting is adequate to perform the task *
properties.textTranslation: The weather and lighting is adequate to perform the task *

properties.name: Label 5
properties.text: I have inspected my work area for slip & trip hazards *
properties.textTranslation: I have inspected my work area for slip & trip hazards *

properties.name: Label 6
properties.text: I have ensured nothing may fall on me or strike me *
properties.textTranslation: I have ensured nothing may fall on me or strike me *

properties.name: Label 7
properties.text: I can access the plant / equipment safely and I have ensured I am not at risk of falling from any height above 1 metre *
properties.textTranslation: I can access the plant / equipment safely and I have ensured I am not at risk of falling from any height above 1 metre *

properties.name: Label 8
properties.text: I have ensured I cannot be caught in, on or between anything *
properties.textTranslation: I have ensured I cannot be caught in, on or between anything *

properties.name: Label 9
properties.text: I have ensured I will not strain or over exert myself *
properties.textTranslation: I have ensured I will not strain or over exert myself *

properties.name: Label 10
properties.text: I have ensured I cannot come into contact with (bio) hazardous substances *
properties.textTranslation: I have ensured I cannot come into contact with (bio) hazardous substances *

properties.name: Label 11
properties.text: I have communicated to surrounding personnel any risks and cordoned / barricaded the work area as required *
properties.textTranslation: I have communicated to surrounding personnel any risks and cordoned / barricaded the work area as required *

properties.name: Label 12
properties.text: I have inspected my work area for underground & overhead hazards *
properties.textTranslation: I have inspected my work area for underground & overhead hazards *

properties.name: Label 13
properties.text: I have removed all vandal covers *
properties.textTranslation: I have removed all vandal covers *

properties.name: Label 14
properties.text: I have conducted a pre-operational inspection and the machine is safe for operation *
properties.textTranslation: I have conducted a pre-operational inspection and the machine is safe for operation *

properties.name: Label 15
properties.text: I can complete the task safely on my own *
properties.textTranslation: I can complete the task safely on my own *

properties.name: Label 1
properties.text: Do I Feel Safe? I would rate the risk of this task as: (Refer Risk Matrix)*
properties.textTranslation: Do I Feel Safe? I would rate the risk of this task as: (Refer Risk Matrix)*

properties.name: richtext_label_6
properties.text: All tasks rated Significant or above must complete a JSEA or SWMS.
properties.textTranslation: All tasks rated Significant or above must complete a JSEA or SWMS.

properties.text: CC User
